productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex TJ Jerry  Navy Blue Sandals
description: Perfect for your little one's everyday adventures, this TJ Jerry Sandal from Warner Brothers makes for a great buy. With a grippy outsole and footbed, this floater offers unparalleled comfort to your little one. Upper Synthetic leather straps on the forefoot, midfoot and back ankle, with velcro closures on the forefoot and midfoot straps for a customised Fit Fabric lining for the straps to offer abrasion-free comfort Ergonomically curved and textured PU footbed for all-day comfort and grip Haul loop for easy on/off and hanging the floaters from a backpack Outsole TPU outsole with strategically placed lugs for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
